candidates.why: This is an explicit COGS-related amortization line, but it appears as a component within the cost of revenues section beneath the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so adding it separately would likely double count.

This is an explicit COGS-related depreciation line, but it appears as a component within the cost of revenues section beneath the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so adding it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS already uses the direct cost-of-revenue row 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The visible amortization/depreciation rows look like sub-components of that cost-of-revenue bucket rather than separate same-level add-ons, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

No SG&A-related depreciation/amortization row is visible in the operating section excerpt. The only explicit D&A rows shown belong to cost of revenues, not SG&A. Since the selected XSGA bucket is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses', there is no separate SG&A D&A row to add.
